title: quercus frutex
intro: Quercus frutex, also known as dwarf oak, is a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the beech family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Quercus frutex include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
